tutorial.title: how to save on ios? ^_^ >_<
tutorial.intro: to save media conveniently on ios, you'll need to use a companion siri shortcut from the share sheet :3
tutorial.step.2: press the "share" button in cobalt's saving dialog >_<
tutorial.step.3: select the respective shortcut in the share sheet :3
tutorial.outro: these shortcuts will work only from the cobalt app, sharing links from other apps will not work >_< sorry :(
